parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: Resets all tracking data and learned background data while this parameter is On.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly resets all tracking data and learned background data.

parameters.name: monosource
parameters.label: Mono Source
parameters.description: Blob tracking is done using a single channel. This menu controls what single channel is used to detect blobs.

parameters.name: drawblobs
parameters.label: Draw Blob Bounds
parameters.description: Draws rectangles on the image that shows where the tracked blobs are.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.label: Threshold
parameters.description: Threshold used to create the binary texture when using background subtraction. It is the threshold of the difference between the background texture and the input texture.

parameters.name: minblobsize
parameters.label: Minimum Blob Size
parameters.description: Blobs must be at least this big to be tracked.

parameters.name: maxblobsize
parameters.label: Maximum Blob Size
parameters.description: Blobs larger than this will not be tracked.

parameters.name: maxmovedistance
parameters.label: Maximum Move Distance
parameters.description: The maximum distance a blob can move in one frame and still be considered to the same blob (maintain the same ID).

parameters.name: deletenearby
parameters.label: Delete Nearby Blobs
parameters.description: Sometimes (depending on the tracking method) duplicate blobs may be created. This feature allows you to delete blobs that are too close to each other.

parameters.name: deletedist
parameters.label: Minimum Distance
parameters.description: When deleting nearby blobs, blobs will be deleted if they are within this number of pixels of each other. The smaller blob will be deleted.

parameters.name: deletenearbytol
parameters.label: Delete Area Tolerance
parameters.description: Along with the distance, the area of the two blobs can be compared. If this parameter is 1, than the area is ignored. As this parameter gets smaller only blobs that have a significant size difference

parameters.name: deleteoverlap
parameters.label: Delete Overlapping Blobs
parameters.description: Deletes blobs that are overlapping.

parameters.name: deleteoverlaptol
parameters.label: Delete Overlap Tolerance
parameters.description: If this parameter is 1 then only blobs that are completely overlapped will be deleted. As this value gets smaller less and less overlap is needed for a blob to get deleted.

parameters.name: reviveblobs
parameters.label: Revive Blobs
parameters.description: When enabled, will revive lost blobs (ie. same ID) if they satisfy all the below parameters

parameters.name: revivetime
parameters.label: Revive Time
parameters.description: The time (in seconds) threshold for reviving a lost blob. If a blob has been lost for longer than revive time, it will not be revived and is considered expired.

parameters.name: revivearea
parameters.label: Revive Area Difference
parameters.description: The area difference threshold for the new blob and the lost blob.

parameters.name: revivedistance
parameters.label: Revive Distance
parameters.description: The distance threshold between the new blob and the lost blob.

parameters.name: includelost
parameters.label: Include Lost Blobs in Table
parameters.description: When enabled, lost blobs will be included in the Blob Track 's Info table.

parameters.name: includeexpired
parameters.label: Include Expired Blobs in Table
parameters.description: When enabled, expired blobs (ie. blobs that have no chance of revival) will be included in the Blob Track 's Info table.

parameters.name: expiredtime
parameters.label: Expired Time
parameters.description: Time in seconds for blobs to remain in the Info table after expiring.

parameters.name: masktop
parameters.label: Masktop
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: downloadtype
parameters.label: Downloadtype
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: blobcolorb
parameters.label: Blobcolorb
parameters.description: Determines the color of the rectangles that are drawn to show the blobs.

examples.label: Configure pageindex and Minimum Blob Size
examples.description: Common settings from 3 real Derivative examples
